message:
Add proper Gantt chart layout from parsed IrGanttMeta with section-aware positioning

Implement layout_diagram_gantt_from_meta() which uses parsed Gantt
metadata (sections, tasks, dependencies, milestones, date ranges) to
produce accurate timeline-based layouts instead of falling back to
generic node positioning. Adds section grouping, dependency-driven
start-day scheduling, milestone support, and proper column-based
x-positioning from day offsets. Update parser to populate IrGanttMeta
with task_id, after_task_id, start_date, duration, milestone, and
section tracking. Update SVG and terminal renderers to handle Gantt
section headers, milestone diamonds, progress bars, and timeline
axis rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
